OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, ALICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MARELYN MONROE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. A LATE OPPOSITION WAS FILED EARLY THIS MORNING. THE OPPOSITION WAS STRICKEN BY THE COURT BECAUSE IT WAS FILED LATE AND WAS SIGNED BY MR. PARMALES WHO IS NOT AN ATTORNEY AND CANNOT REPRESENT OR SIGN ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. ANSWER IS TO BE FILED TODAY, JUNE 9, 2009. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
